Trader Payout Interviews

Real traders sharing their experience and journey

Your solution to
trading challenges

Your path to becoming a funded trader.

Whether you're an experienced trader or just starting, our platform offers the opportunities and support you need. We understand the challenges you face and have designed our platform to address them head-on.

ACCOUNT FREEDOM
Access virtual capital for your success

Whether beginner or expert, our platform equips you with tools, guidance, and real growth opportunities.

SCALING ENGINE
Experience industry leading payout times

Enjoy industry-leading payout speed. Profits delivered instantly, with on-demand withdrawals anytime you request.

RISK DESK SUPPORT
Benefit from the 'Second Chance' Approach

Breach a rule? Instantly restart from phase one, learn from mistakes, and continue progressing confidently.

Trader Payouts

Real payouts shared inside our community

The FundedElite
key advantage

Every rule is transparent, payouts never stall, and your profitability is protected at each phase of the journey.

Get Funded
Instant Funding

Start trading funded accounts immediately , no long evaluations or delays. When you’re ready to trade, your account is too.

Free Retry Accounts

Available on select account types , if you don’t pass, you can try again instantly at no extra cost. One setback shouldn’t end your journey.

News Trading Allowed

Trade high-impact events freely. If there’s opportunity in the markets, you should be able to take it.

Payouts in 3 Days

Request your payout after your trading phase , typically processed within 3 days.

Custom Accounts

Choose the account size, rules, and drawdowns that match your strategy. Trading shouldn’t be one-size-fits-all , it should fit you.

Pay After Pass

With our flash activation challenge, start any account for just $5, and activate only after passing.

Built for traders,

down to the details

No Time Limits

24/7 Support

Up to 95% Profit Split

Built-In Elite Dashboard

Trade on the platforms
you know and trust

Choose your terminal, keep your favorite indicators, and connect to the best funded liquidity in minutes.

MetaTrader 5

Power your trading with MT5’s advanced analytics, multi-asset support, and lightning-fast execution.

Learn More
Match-Trader

Trade with Match-Trader’s intuitive interface, advanced charts, and fast execution.

Learn More
How it works
behind Funded

Your path to becoming a funded trader

Choose your account

Select your preferred account type and size up to $300K in simulated funding.

Complete the challenge

Trade under evaluation rules and reach the required profit target to qualify.

Trade as a funded trader

Once you pass, receive a simulated funded account where you can continue trading and earn payouts.

Receive your payout

Request your payout once eligible typically processed within three days.

Flexible Funding
Plans for traders

You deserve the best, and at Funded Elite we prioritize your growth and success!

PAYOUTS
We're paying out more
than ever before

Rewarding our traders every day.

Real stories and feedback from funded traders

Eduardo Anaya, a trader with four years of experience, recommends Funded Elite for its clean interface, fast communication, and unique single-step evaluation process that provides a stress-free and effective pathway to professional trading.

Mosam Rezvi credits Funded Elite’s fair challenge rules and intuitive dashboard for helping him master the discipline and risk management necessary to successfully transition to funded trading.

Elite Performance
Dashboard

A full-performance journaling suite built to give traders clarity, insight, and complete control over their results.

Get Funded
Trusted and talked about
by traders everywhere

From challenge to funded our traders share their journey.

Find answers to
common questions

Clear answers. Zero confusion.

All FAQ
How fast can I activate my funded account?
−

Once you clear verification, your account is deployed instantly with login credentials and dashboard access ready to go. No manual review delays.

What rules do I need to follow day to day?
+

Everything is documented in the dashboard FAQ: daily loss rules, maximum drawdown, payout cadence, even how holds work prior to news events.

How do payouts work?
+

Submit a payout request twice per week and get wired or sent via crypto inside 48h. The dashboard tracks your eligibility in real time.

Can I reset or scale my account?
+

Yes. Free resets help you keep going if you break a rule, and scaling milestones automatically expand buying power after consistency targets.

Who do I talk to if Iu2019m stuck?
+

A live support desk runs 7 days a week on chat and Discord. You can also open tickets inside the dashboard that route straight to the risk team.

24/7 human support

Get real-time help from our team whenever you need it.

Talk to Support
↗

And receive an exclusive 10% discount code.

The content on this website is for educational purposes only and does not constitute investment advice, business consulting, or financial recommendations. Our services assess professional skills, and results vary based on individual ability and adherence to program guidelines. Clients should review all requirements before enrolling.

Accounts are for practice purposes only. Hypothetical performance has limitations and may not reflect actual results. No profit guarantees are provided. Trading Forex and CFDs carries high risk and may lead to the loss of all capital. Leverage can amplify both gains and losses.
